allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "d:\\INNOVATE X" -Force -Recurse | Select-Object @{Name='Path';Expression={$_.FullName -replace [regex]::Escape\('d:\\INNOVATE X\\'\), ''}}, @{Name='Type';Expression={if\($_.PSIsContainer\) {'DIR'} else {'FILE'}}}, @{Name='Size';Expression={if\($_.PSIsContainer\) {'-'} else {$_.Length}}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "d:\\INNOVATE X" -Force -Recurse | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Select-Object FullName | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName })
